ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 5th April
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a gentle reminder that the submission deadline for our semester project – 'Advanced Data Analytics' – is on Friday, 5th April 2024, 11:59 PM. Please ensure that your project report and presentation slides are uploaded to the LMS by the deadline.

If you have any questions or require additional guidance, feel free to reach out.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Prof. R. K. Gupta
Course Coordinator

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Verification Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

I am Dr. Asha Sharma, the Scholarship Verification Officer at the prestigious National Institute of Technology (NIT). We have selected you for a merit-based scholarship of INR 50,000 for the upcoming academic year. However, our records indicate that your scholarship application is still pending verification. To secure your scholarship, you must submit the required documents within 48 hours.

Please click on the link below to upload your documents and confirm your eligibility:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in the forfeiture of your scholarship award. This process is mandatory to comply with university regulations and financial aid policies.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Dr. Asha Sharma
Scholarship Verification Officer
National Institute of Technology
